/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wvla -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -fstack-protector-strong -mavx2 -DAMA_HAS_AVX2 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pqc_demo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pqc_demo.dir/pqc_demo.c.o -o ../../bin/pqc_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/AMA-Cryptography/AMA-Cryptography/build-on/lib: ../../lib/libama_cryptography.so.3.0.0
